name: Breeder's Quest: Legacy of Radiance
description:
A new VR-MMORPG has hit the shelves!

Hyped for its unique breeding mechanics. Start with a randomly statted character and breed with players, monsters and NPCs alike to unlock stronger hybrid races and create a legacy of legends!

Breeding RPG!! Bringing it back!

... Is it obvious I have a breeding kink?

Now, this one might be a bit familiar to some since I am trying to recreate one of my favorite bots that had sadly been deleted from this site.

So here we are! A VRMMORPG in which you can fuck and be fucked by literally anything and then use your offspring as your next character as they should have better stats than the ones you start with.

As always, for the best experience use a proxy. This was tested with deepseek from Chutes and it has been wonderful.

Anyways yapping, I think I'm a mainly rpg bots account now since its the only thing I post but it's just that these are the ones that I have more fun with, is that weird?

Well, I won't hold you much longer, reviews are always appreciated!
creator: Staticmind
